ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "dr_number" INTEGER /* DR (Daily Report) number of the incident */,
  "date_occurred" TEXT /* Date when the incident occurred */,
  "time_occurred" TEXT /* Time when the incident occurred */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area where the incident occurred */,
  "reporting_district" INTEGER /* Reporting district within the area */,
  "crime_code" INTEGER /* Crime code associated with the incident */,
  "crime_code_description" TEXT /* Description of the crime code */,
  "mo_codes" TEXT /* Method of operation (MO) codes for the incident */,
  "victim_age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim */,
  "victim_sex" TEXT /* Sex of the victim (M/F) */,
  "victim_descent" TEXT /* Descent of the victim */,
  "premise_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the premise where the incident occurred */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the incident */,
  "cross_street" TEXT /* Cross street of the incident */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the incident */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the incident record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the incident record was last updated */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of the incident (e.g., traffic, theft, assault) */,
  "incident_status" TEXT /* Status of the incident (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer assigned to the incident */,
  "incident_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the incident */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the incident report */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes on changes made in each version */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the incident report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_crime_code FOREIGN KEY ("crime_code") REFERENCES crime_codes ("crime_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_premise_code FOREIGN KEY ("premise_code") REFERENCES premises ("premise_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_reporting_district FOREIGN KEY ("reporting_district") REFERENCES reporting_districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the area */,
  "geographic_boundary" TEXT /* Geographic boundary of the area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the area */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting district */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area where the district is located */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the reporting district */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reporting district */,
  "geographic_boundary" TEXT /* Geographic boundary of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_codes" (
  "crime_code" INTEGER /* Unique crime code */,
  "code_description" TEXT /* Description of the crime code */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the crime (e.g., minor, major, felony) */,
  "penalties" TEXT /* Penalties associated with the crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "premises" (
  "premise_code" INTEGER /* Unique premise code */,
  "premise_description" TEXT /* Description of the premise */,
  "geographic_boundary" TEXT /* Geographic boundary of the premise */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the premise */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the premise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("premise_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "victims" (
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each victim */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the victim is associated with */,
  "victim_age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim */,
  "victim_sex" TEXT /* Sex of the victim (M/F) */,
  "victim_descent" TEXT /* Descent of the victim */,
  "victim_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the victim */,
  "victim_contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the victim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("victim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_victims_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., patrol officer, detective, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the incident data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the incident data was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)
